name: Apple Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red apples (Mac or Cortland variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and dice apples into 1/4 inch pieces.
2. Toss the diced apples immediately with lime juice.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Chill for 2 hours before serving.
5. This salsa pairs well with pork, chicken, turkey, and fish. It makes approximately 3 cups.
